query:
ALTER TABLE h_inventory_transactions 
MODIFY COLUMN transaction_type ENUM('receipt', 'usage', 'adjustment', 'transfer', 'disposal', 'return', 'inbound', 'outbound') NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN source_type VARCHAR(50) AFTER action_type,
ADD COLUMN purpose VARCHAR(100) AFTER source_type,
ADD COLUMN performed_by BIGINT AFTER purpose,
ADD COLUMN updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AFTER created_at;
